name: Depressed Mood
description: Persistent sadness, emptiness, or hopelessness most of the day, nearly every day
screening_questions: Have you been feeling sad, empty, or hopeless?
Do you feel down most of the day, nearly every day?

name: Anhedonia
description: Markedly diminished interest or pleasure in all or almost all activities
screening_questions: Have you lost interest in things you used to enjoy?
Do activities that used to be fun feel pointless now?

name: Appetite/Weight Change
description: Significant weight loss or gain (>5% in a month) or appetite change nearly every day
screening_questions: Have you lost or gained weight without trying?

name: Sleep Disturbance
description: Insomnia or hypersomnia nearly every day
screening_questions: Are you having trouble sleeping, or sleeping too much?

name: Psychomotor Change
description: Psychomotor agitation or retardation observable by others
screening_questions: Have others noticed you seem restless or slowed down?

name: Fatigue
description: Fatigue or loss of energy nearly every day
screening_questions: Do you feel tired or have little energy most days?

name: Worthlessness/Guilt
description: Feelings of worthlessness or excessive inappropriate guilt
screening_questions: Do you feel bad about yourself, or like you've let people down?

name: Cognitive Impairment
description: Diminished ability to think, concentrate, or make decisions
screening_questions: Do you have trouble concentrating or making decisions?

name: Suicidal Ideation
description: Recurrent thoughts of death, suicidal ideation, or suicide attempt
screening_questions: Have you had thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself?
